pr.title: Record: LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Per-Document LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=0.9443, 3 seeds)

output.summary: 11-layer U-Net uses LeakyReLU(0.5)² and per-document LoRA test-time training with Muon+SWA before int8+zstd-22 compression.
techniques: LeakyReLU(0.5)² U-Net with SmearGate/BigramHash depth-scaled residuals
Per-document LoRA TTT over three epochs (chunk=256, docs ≥512 tokens)
int8+zstd-22 quantization layered on Muon+WD with SWA
